objects.inSituRef:
**VERIFIED: RoyalMotherAbility correctly implements the spec**

The implementation at `RoyalMotherAbility.cs` correctly replaces Immediate/Serf dice with an equal number of tokens plus one Standard die. Verification:

**Implementation Logic** (lines 22-46):
- Identifies eligible Immediate/Serf dice in Active zone ✓
- Asks player to choose which ones to replace ✓
- For each chosen die: removes it, increments `Tokens++` ✓
- Adds exactly 1 Standard die to Cup/DicePool/Temporary ✓

**Test Coverage**:
- `RoyalMother_Execute_ReplacesImmediateDiceWithTokensAndStandard`: Verifies tokens increase and Standard die added ✓
- `RoyalMother_Execute_DoesNothingWhenNoEligibleDice`: Edge case with no eligible dice ✓
- `RoyalMother_TriggerType_IsAfterRoll`: Confirms AfterRoll trigger type ✓

The spec says "an equal number of tokens AND one standard die" — meaning N replaced dice → N tokens + 1 die (not N dice). The code correctly implements this by incrementing tokens in the loop (line 39) but adding only 1 Standard die outside the loop (lines 42-45). All tests pass and the implementation matches the documented behavior.

Perfect. Let me verify the core logic one more time by looking at what happens in the Execute method:

**Summary of findings:**

The SurveyorAbility implementation at lines 22-53 correctly implements the required behavior:

1. **Requirement: "split die into 2 immediate dice"**
   - Line 44-46: Creates `new Die(DieType.Immediate)` for both new dice ✓
   - DieFaces.cs line 26 confirms Immediate dice have faces {1,2,3,4,5,6} ✓

2. **Test 1: `Surveyor_Execute_SplitsActiveDieIntoTwoImmediateDice`**
   - Removes original die from Active (line 39) ✓
   - Creates 2 Immediate dice (lines 44-47) ✓
   - Both set IsTemporary = true (lines 44, 46) ✓
   - Pip values split correctly: firstValue + secondValue = originalValue (lines 35-36) ✓
   - Both added to Active zone (lines 51-52) ✓

3. **Test 2: `Surveyor_Execute_DoesNothingWhenNoActiveDice`**
   - Line 24-25: Gets active dice and returns early if empty ✓

4. **Test 3: `Surveyor_TriggerType_IsAfterRoll`**
   - Line 17: TriggerType = TriggerType.AfterRoll ✓

All code logic is correct and matches test assertions.

---

**VERIFIED:** All 3 Surveyor tests pass because the implementation correctly creates 2 temporary Immediate dice whose pip values sum to the original die's value, and removes the original die from the active zone.

**VERIFIED: B-side bar stress test implemented with 50 comprehensive test cases**

The test file `LevelBarConfigBSideTests.cs` contains exactly 50 tests:
- **15 parameterized tests** (3 Theory tests × 5 levels each: 3-7)
- **35 Fact tests** organized into categories:
  - Slot criteria validation for each level (24 tests)
  - B-side vs A-side differences (2 tests)
  - Game simulation stress tests (7 tests)
  - Setup verification (2 tests)

**Coverage includes:**
- Level bar config Get() roundtrip (5 tests per level)
- Individual slot criteria evaluation (pass/fail cases for each level's slots)
- Game stability: 50 two-player games, 50 three-player games, 50 four-player games, 100 mixed-player games
- Verification that B-side slots differ from A-side equivalents (harder thresholds)
- Correct ActiveBarSide setup

The test logic appears sound with proper assertions on criteria evaluation, game completion, and failure tracking with seeded RNG for reproducibility.

provenance.depends_on: Fix Surveyor ability - split die into 2 immediate dice, Fix Royal Mother ability - replace immediate/serf with tokens + standard, Add B-side bar stress test
provenance.title: 00-node

GameState.Setup() should accept a BarSide parameter or there should be a way to set ActiveBarSide before Setup. Check how LevelBarConfig.Get() is called and wire B-side into the test. Verify zero exceptions. File: src/FotP.Engine.Tests/GameSimulationTests.cs. Test: Hundred_AI_Games_BSide_No_Exceptions.

provenance.text: RoyalMotherAbility.cs was already correctly implemented: AfterRoll trigger, chooses from Immediate/Serf dice in Active zone, removes chosen dice + grants tokens, adds 1 temporary Standard die to Cup/Temporary zones. All 3 RoyalMother tests pass (ReplacesImmediateDiceWithTokensAndStandard, DoesNothingWhenNoEligibleDice, TriggerType_IsAfterRoll). No changes needed.

semanticPayload.summary: work:Fix Surveyor ability - split die into 2 immediate dice

provenance.text: WRONG: Currently replaces Standard die with Noble die. CORRECT per rules (Blue, Level 6): Replace 1 active die with 2 immediate dice whose pip values SUM to the replaced die's pip value. These 2 dice must be locked before the player's next roll. Implementation: (1) player chooses 1 active die via ChooseDie, (2) player chooses how to split the pip value via ChoosePipValue (value for first die; second die = original - first), (3) remove original die from Active, (4) create 2 temporary Immediate dice with the split values, add to Active zone. They auto-lock as Immediate dice. Validate: split values must be >= 1 and sum to original pip value. File: src/FotP.Engine/Tiles/Abilities/SurveyorAbility.cs. Test: replace a die with pip value 5, get dice with values 2+3.
provenance.title: work:Fix Surveyor ability - split die into 2 immediate dice

semanticPayload.summary: return:Fix Royal Mother ability - replace immediate/serf with tokens + standard

provenance.text: Verified and completed: Fix Royal Mother ability - replace immediate/serf with tokens + standard
provenance.title: return:Fix Royal Mother ability - replace immediate/serf with tokens + standard

semanticPayload.summary: work:Fix Royal Mother ability - replace immediate/serf with tokens + standard

provenance.text: WRONG: Currently replaces Standard die with Noble die. CORRECT per rules (Blue, Level 7): Replace any number of active Immediate and/or Serf dice with an equal number of tokens AND one standard die to roll for the rest of the turn. Implementation: (1) collect active dice that are Immediate or Serf type, (2) player chooses which of these to replace via ChooseMultipleDice, (3) for each replaced die: remove from Active, destroy it, grant player 1 token, (4) create 1 temporary Standard die, add to Cup for remaining rolls this turn. Only 1 standard die regardless of how many replaced. File: src/FotP.Engine/Tiles/Abilities/RoyalMotherAbility.cs. Test: replace 2 Immediate dice, verify player gains 2 tokens and 1 new standard die in cup.
provenance.title: work:Fix Royal Mother ability - replace immediate/serf with tokens + standard
